original_abstract: Enantioselective allylation represents a cornerstone of modern organic chemistry, providing a powerful means of constructing chiral homoallylic alcohols and amines. These motifs are indispensable building blocks, frequently employed in the total synthesis of complex natural products and the development of essential pharmaceuticals.
humanized_abstract: Enantioselective allylation is one of the workhorses in organic chemistry, a versatile method for the preparation of chiral homoallylic alcohols and amines. These functional groups are common in many natural products and drug molecules and hence are prepared using various methods including enantioselective allylation.

document.output: Enantioselective allylation is one of the workhorses in organic chemistry, a versatile method for the preparation of chiral homoallylic alcohols and amines. These functional groups are common in many natural products and drug molecules and hence are prepared using various methods including enantioselective allylation.
